title: Authors and Citation

code: @Manual{CepalStatR,   title = {CepalStatR: a package in R for access to ECLAC statistics},   author = {Henry Osorto},   year = {2024},   note = {R package version 0.1.0},   doi = {10.18687/LACCEI2024.1.1.1473}, }

what: CepalStatR: Access to ECLAC (CEPALSTAT) Statistics via R — CepalStatR-package
title: CepalStatR: Access to ECLAC (CEPALSTAT) Statistics via R — CepalStatR-package
text: Tools explore metadata retrieve indicators CEPALSTAT API Economic Commission Latin America Caribbean (ECLAC), support tidy outputs, hierarchical indicator browsing, basic visualizations.

title: CepalStatR: Access to ECLAC (CEPALSTAT) Statistics via R — CepalStatR-package
text: Maintainer: Henry Osorto henry.osorto@unah.edu.hn (ORCID)

title: Call Data Indicators CEPALSTAT — call.data
text: Retrieves indicator data CEPALSTAT API JSON format returns data frame values, dimensions, metadata, optionally footnotes.

title: Call Data Indicators CEPALSTAT — call.data
code: call.data(id.indicator, language.en = TRUE, notes = FALSE,                  progress = TRUE, add.indicator.name = TRUE)

title: Call Data Indicators CEPALSTAT — call.data
text: id.indicator single CEPALSTAT indicator ID. language.en Logical. TRUE (default), output uses English labels. FALSE, Spanish labels used applicable. notes Logical. TRUE, footnotes joined available. progress Logical. TRUE, progress messages shown. add.indicator.name Logical. TRUE, adds indicator ID indicator name.

title: Call Data Indicators CEPALSTAT — call.data
text: data frame indicator values, dimension labels, metadata.

title: Call Data Indicators CEPALSTAT — call.data
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ data <- call.data(id.indicator = 4788) data <- call.data(id.indicator = 4788, language.en = FALSE) data <- call.data(id.indicator = 4788, notes = TRUE) } # }

title: Call indicators from CEPALSTAT — call.indicators
text: Retrieves thematic tree CEPALSTAT API JSON format returns data frame hierarchical structure indicators.

title: Call indicators from CEPALSTAT — call.indicators
text: language.en Logical. TRUE (default), labels returned English. FALSE, labels returned Spanish. progress Logical. TRUE (default), progress messages displayed.

title: Call indicators from CEPALSTAT — call.indicators
text: data frame hierarchical thematic structure CEPALSTAT indicators corresponding indicator ID.

title: Call indicators from CEPALSTAT — call.indicators
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ data.indicators <- call.indicators() data.indicators <- call.indicators(language.en = FALSE) } # }

what: List of countries available in CEPALSTAT — countries
title: List of countries available in CEPALSTAT — countries
text: Retrieves list countries available CEPALSTAT using dimensions endpoint reference indicator. approach avoids downloading full datasets ensures consistency API structure.

title: List of countries available in CEPALSTAT — countries
List of countries available in CEPALSTAT — countries
text: language.en Logical. TRUE (default), returns country names English. FALSE, returns names Spanish.

title: List of countries available in CEPALSTAT — countries
text: data frame containing list countries.

title: List of countries available in CEPALSTAT — countries
text: function extracts "Country" ("Pas") dimension CEPALSTAT API using JSON-based request. method efficient retrieving full indicator datasets.

title: Pipe operator — %>%
text: See magrittr::%>% details.

title: Pipe operator — %>%
text: lhs value magrittr placeholder. rhs function call using magrittr semantics.

title: Pipe operator — %>%
text: result calling rhs(lhs).

title: Population pyramids — pyramids
text: Creates one multiple population pyramids selected country years using CEPALSTAT population--age--sex data.

title: Population pyramids — pyramids
code: pyramids(   country,   years = 1:31,   language.en = TRUE,   color = c("#0C4A61", "#34B0AA"),   save = FALSE,   file = NULL,   format = c("png", "pdf", "svg"),   height = 5,   width = 7,   caption = TRUE,   progress = TRUE )

title: Population pyramids — pyramids
text: country Character. Name country region plot. years Numeric vector positions 1 31 corresponding 5-year intervals 1950 2100. language.en Logical. TRUE (default), English labels used. FALSE, Spanish labels used. color Character vector length 2 colors men women. save Logical. TRUE, saves resulting figure. file Character. Output filename save = TRUE. NULL, default filename used. format Character. Output format save = TRUE. One "png" (default), "pdf" "svg". height Numeric. Height saved figure. width Numeric. Width saved figure. caption Logical. TRUE, adds caption source information. progress Logical. TRUE, progress messages shown.

title: Population pyramids — pyramids
text: Invisibly returns grob object created gridExtra::arrangeGrob().

title: Population pyramids — pyramids
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ # Single year pyramids(country = "Honduras", years = 16)  # Multiple years pyramids(country = "Honduras", years = c(1, 5, 10, 15))  # Save as PNG pyramids(   country = "Honduras",   years = c(1, 5, 10, 15),   save = TRUE )  # Save as PDF pyramids(   country = "Honduras",   years = c(1, 5, 10, 15),   save = TRUE,   format = "pdf",   file = "pyramids.pdf" )  # Save as SVG pyramids(   country = "Honduras",   years = c(1, 5, 10, 15),   save = TRUE,   format = "svg",   file = "pyramids.svg" ) } # }

title: Sustainable Development Goals ranking — ranking.sdg
text: Creates ranking chart CEPALSTAT indicator belonging Sustainable Development Goals (SDG/ODS) dimension, using latest available data country.

title: Sustainable Development Goals ranking — ranking.sdg
code: ranking.sdg(   id.indicator,   language.en = TRUE,   save = FALSE,   file = NULL,   format = c("png", "pdf", "svg"),   height = 5,   width = 9,   size.title = 10,   title = TRUE,   caption = TRUE,   color = "#0C4A61",   color.gc = "#34B0AA",   progress = TRUE )

title: Sustainable Development Goals ranking — ranking.sdg
text: id.indicator Numeric character. Indicator ID. language.en Logical. TRUE (default), English labels used. FALSE, Spanish labels used. save Logical. TRUE, saves resulting figure. file Character. Output filename save = TRUE. NULL, default filename used. format Character. Output format save = TRUE. One "png" (default), "pdf" "svg". height Numeric. Height saved figure. width Numeric. Width saved figure. size.title Numeric. Title size. title Logical. TRUE, displays chart title. caption Logical. TRUE, displays note indicating latest available year country. color Character. Color countries ranking. color.gc Character. Color regional aggregates present. progress Logical. TRUE, shows progress messages execution.

title: Sustainable Development Goals ranking — ranking.sdg
text: Invisibly returns ggplot object.

title: Sustainable Development Goals ranking — ranking.sdg
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ ranking.sdg(id.indicator = 3682) ranking.sdg(id.indicator = 3682, language.en = FALSE)  ranking.sdg(   id.indicator = 3682,   save = TRUE )  ranking.sdg(   id.indicator = 3682,   save = TRUE,   format = "pdf",   file = "ranking_sdg.pdf" )  ranking.sdg(   id.indicator = 3682,   save = TRUE,   format = "svg",   file = "ranking_sdg.svg" ) } # }

what: CEPALSTAT thematic map of indicators — topic_map
title: CEPALSTAT thematic map of indicators — topic_map
text: Creates interactive thematic tree CEPALSTAT indicators using collapsibleTree, visual header footer style viewer.indicators().

title: CEPALSTAT thematic map of indicators — topic_map
code: topic_map(language.en = TRUE, progress = TRUE, open.browser = FALSE)

title: CEPALSTAT thematic map of indicators — topic_map
text: language.en Logical. TRUE (default), English labels used. FALSE, Spanish labels used. progress Logical. TRUE, progress messages shown. open.browser Logical. TRUE, generated HTML saved temporary file opened default web browser. Defaults FALSE.

title: CEPALSTAT thematic map of indicators — topic_map
text: browsable HTML widget.

title: CEPALSTAT thematic map of indicators — topic_map
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ cepal_topic_map() cepal_topic_map(language.en = FALSE) cepal_topic_map(open.browser = TRUE) } # }

title: Viewer for CEPALSTAT indicators — viewer.indicators
text: Displays interactive HTML table browsing hierarchical structure CEPALSTAT indicators using call.indicators() backend.

title: Viewer for CEPALSTAT indicators — viewer.indicators
code: viewer.indicators(   language.en = TRUE,   progress = TRUE,   show_search = TRUE,   striped = TRUE,   bordered = FALSE,   compact = FALSE,   highlight = TRUE,   full_width = TRUE,   page_size = 15,   open.browser = FALSE )

title: Viewer for CEPALSTAT indicators — viewer.indicators
text: language.en Logical. TRUE (default), viewer uses English labels. FALSE, Spanish labels used. progress Logical. TRUE, progress messages shown. show_search Logical. TRUE, enables global search table. striped Logical. TRUE, striped rows shown. bordered Logical. TRUE, table borders shown. compact Logical. TRUE, reduces row padding. highlight Logical. TRUE, highlights rows hover. full_width Logical. TRUE, table uses full available width. page_size Integer. Number rows show per page. open.browser Logical. TRUE, generated HTML saved temporary file opened default web browser. Defaults FALSE.

title: Viewer for CEPALSTAT indicators — viewer.indicators
text: browsable HTML object containing header interactive table.

title: Viewer for CEPALSTAT indicators — viewer.indicators
code: if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{ viewer.indicators() viewer.indicators(language.en = FALSE) viewer.indicators(open.browser = TRUE) } # }

CSS for viewer.indicators header layout — viewer_indicators_style
